overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail. The character travels through sunlit woods with tall grass, passing by a lake before entering a denser, shaded section of forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail with tall grass meadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the sunlit forest, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass and stones
tall golden-green grass lining the left side of the path
tall golden-green grass lining the right side of the path
tall trees with green and autumn-colored foliage surrounding the path
hazy mountains visible in the distance through the trees
light fog or mist hanging in the forest air creating depth

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit forest trail surrounded by tall grass and deciduous trees. The path winds through an open woodland area with distant mountains visible through atmospheric mist, creating a serene natural environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail along lakeshore with open water views

events.description: forest opens to reveal a large lake or body of water on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens to reveal the lakeshore on the right

entered.detail: calm blue lake water visible through the trees on the right side
reeds and bushes growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The path curves to reveal a scenic lake on the right, with the forest continuing on the left. The open water creates a brighter, more expansive atmosphere as Geralt continues walking along the shoreline trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest path with rocky outcrops and dense canopy

events.description: entering denser tree cover, sunlight becomes filtered and dappled through the canopy

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded, denser section of forest with rocks visible along the path

entered.detail: large gray rock formations and boulders alongside the trail
thick overhead tree cover blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser, shaded forest section with rocky outcrops and thick canopy cover. The lake is no longer visible as the path curves deeper into the woods, with lighting becoming more subdued and dappled.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, open woodland that gradually transitions into a dense, shaded forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit trail surrounded by tall grass and deciduous trees, with distant mountains visible through a light atmospheric mist. As the path curves, the environment opens up to reveal a scenic lake on the right, shifting the atmosphere toward a brighter and more expansive shoreline. The scene then shifts as the trail leads away from the water and enters a thicker section of woods characterized by rocky outcrops and a heavy canopy. Finally, the lighting becomes subdued and dappled as the camera follows the path deeper into the shaded forest.
